Spotter heard call over scanner regarding damage to at least 3 trailers at Longview Estates in Woodville. Possible tornado damage. Time estimated.

*** 8 INJ *** The tornado touched down around 302 AM EDT in a field just southwest of Longview Estates near Woodville Road. The tornado quickly moved northeast, rolling and destroying 3 mobile homes in Longview Estates, and damaging several others. Eight injuries occurred in Longview Estates, and the strongest wind speeds of up to 110 mph were in this area. After exiting Longview Estates, the tornado then moved across the Little River, then crossed Halls Creek Road near Glade Road. The tornado tracked near Glade Road while downing numerous trees and damaging some sheds along the path. The tornado lifted around 306 AM EDT near the intersection of Glade Road and Simpson Ditch Road.
